blended.narrative: Lutsen Mountains is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 10 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 6 ft. Looking ahead, 14 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 10" of heavy snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
Wednesday: 2.8" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
